digest.component_or_area: mutation-testing shard config for concurrency decision logic
propositions: Mutation testing currently covers only five behavioral cores and lacks coverage of concurrency machinery.
Narrow mutation shards should target pure/near-pure decision helpers extracted from subprocess-heavy orchestration modules.
Mutation shards target compaction fold/rollback, remote-append, and push paths after prerequisite stories S1/S3/S4 land.
Sync branch selection and lock stale-owner/reclamation are descoped unless this story adds their behavioral tests, requiring a follow-up story.
Mapped mutation scores for new shards are recorded in docs/mutation-testing.md and this story depends_on S1/S3/S4.
